bird.summary: The giant nuthatch (Sitta magna) is a species of bird in the family Sittidae. It is the longest of the nuthatches, measuring 19.5 cm (7.7 i…

locations.name: 贵州省
locations.summary: 贵州省，简称贵或黔，是中華人民共和国西南地区的一个省份，位于云贵高原东部。省会是贵阳市。貴州介于东经103°36′—109°35′、北纬24°37′—29°13′之间，东毗湖南、南邻广西、西连云南、北接四川和重庆。全省东西长约595公里，…

locations.name: 新津区
locations.summary: 新津区位于中华人民共和国四川省成都平原西南部，是成都市下辖的一个市辖区。人口約36.5万，区人民政府駐五津街道模範街56號。 历史 在新津龙马乡发现了新石器时代晚期的古城遗址，现代考古研究认为属于成都平原史前的宝墩文化的组成部分，同时新津…

locations.name: 曼德勒
locations.summary: 曼德勒（緬甸語：မန္တလေး manta.le: [mándəlé]；英語：Mandalay），緬甸華人又称为瓦城、華城，位於緬甸中部伊洛瓦底江畔，是曼德勒省省會，緬甸第二大城市，因背靠曼德勒山而得名。 曼德勒城由贡榜王朝敏东王于185…

relations.subject: 巨䴓
relations.evidence: 170 The giant nuthatch lives from south-central China to northwestern Thailand. In China, it is found in the north, in southern Sichuan and Guizhou (in Xingyi, in particular)

relations.subject: 巨䴓
relations.evidence: In Myanmar, it inhabits a large part of Shan State, and its distribution ends in the northwest at the Mogok Hills of the Mandalay region, in the central-west around Myinkyado, and in the south at Mount Nat Taung

relations.subject: 巨䴓
relations.evidence: 170–171 The giant nuthatch has been seen in live animal markets before, but poaching is likely a marginal threat
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
